title: Software Engineer, Cloud Infrastructure
description: Join Google Cloud to build and maintain the infrastructure that powers millions of users worldwide. You'll work on distributed systems, containerization, and cloud-native technologies that define the future of computing.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain scalable cloud infrastructure services
Build and optimize container orchestration systems using Kubernetes
Implement monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve system reliability
Write technical documentation and participate in code reviews
Mentor junior engineers and contribute to team growth
education_requirement: BS in Computer Science or equivalent experience

title: Software Development Engineer II - AWS Security
description: Help secure the world's most comprehensive cloud platform. As an SDE on the AWS Security team, you'll build systems that protect millions of customers and their data. You'll work on identity management, encryption services, and threat detection at unprecedented scale.
responsibilities: Design and implement security services for AWS infrastructure
Build identity and access management (IAM) systems
Develop encryption and key management solutions
Create automated security testing and vulnerability scanning tools
Respond to security incidents and implement preventive measures
Work with compliance teams to meet regulatory requirements
education_requirement: BS/MS in Computer Science, Security, or related field

title: Senior Software Engineer - Cortex XSIAM
description: Join the team building Cortex XSIAM, the world's first autonomous security operations platform. You'll work on cutting-edge AI/ML-powered security automation, processing billions of security events daily to detect and respond to threats in real-time.
responsibilities: Design and develop features for the Cortex XSIAM platform
Build high-throughput data pipelines for security event processing
Implement machine learning models for threat detection
Optimize system performance for processing billions of events
Collaborate with security researchers on detection algorithms
Lead technical design discussions and architecture reviews
education_requirement: BS in Computer Science; MS preferred

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Siri
description: Help make Siri smarter and more helpful for over a billion users. You'll work on natural language processing, speech recognition, and conversational AI that powers Apple's intelligent assistant across all devices.
responsibilities: Develop and optimize NLP models for intent classification
Build and improve speech recognition systems
Design conversational AI features for multi-turn dialogues
Create efficient on-device ML models for privacy-preserving inference
Analyze user interactions to improve model accuracy
Collaborate with product teams to define ML-powered features
education_requirement: MS/PhD in Computer Science, ML, or related field

title: Full Stack Software Engineer - Reality Labs
description: Build the future of social connection in virtual and augmented reality. Join Reality Labs to create immersive experiences that connect billions of people. You'll work on web and mobile applications that power the metaverse ecosystem.
responsibilities: Build full-stack applications for VR/AR platforms
Develop React-based web applications with GraphQL backends
Create mobile experiences using React Native
Implement real-time collaboration features
Optimize application performance for global scale
Work with 3D rendering and spatial computing APIs
education_requirement: BS in Computer Science or equivalent experience
